---
title: "TB in vitro mixture dataset"
output: 'github_document'
---


```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)

table_1 <- readRDS('table_1.rds')
method_order <- table_1 %>% pull(method) %>% discard(str_detect, '\\(')
bimix_tbl <- readRDS('05/bimix_tbl.rds')

is_duo_by_depth <- readRDS('05/is_duo_by_depth.rds')
is_duo_by_mp <- readRDS('05/is_duo_by_mp.rds')
is_duo_by_dist <- readRDS('05/is_duo_by_dist.rds')

is_trio_accuracy <- readRDS('05/is_trio_accuracy.rds')
```



```{r panel_A}

panel_A <-
  bind_rows(
  is_duo_by_depth %>% 
    filter(measure %in% c('nMCC', '1-MAE')) %>% 
    mutate(x_name = 'Coverage') %>% 
    rename(x_value = depth,
           y_value = value,
           y_name = measure),
  is_duo_by_mp %>% 
    filter(measure %in% c('nMCC', '1-MAE')) %>% 
    mutate(x_name = 'Minor Percent') %>% 
    rename(x_value = minor_percent,
           y_value = value,
           y_name = measure),
  is_duo_by_dist %>% 
    filter(measure %in% c('nMCC', '1-MAE')) %>% 
    mutate(x_name = 'Distance Bin') %>% 
    rename(x_value = dist_bin,
           y_value = value,
           y_name = measure)) %>% 
  filter(method %in% method_order) %>%
  mutate(
    y_name = factor(y_name, c('nMCC', '1-MAE')),
    x_name = factor(x_name, c('Coverage', 'Minor Percent', 'Distance Bin')),
  ) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(
    x = x_value, 
    y = y_value,
    colour = method,
    shape = method)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(y_name), cols = vars(x_name),
    scales = 'free',
    switch = 'both') +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank())

panel_A
```

```{r panel_B}
breaks <- unique(bimix_tbl$minor_percent) %>% na.omit()

panel_B <-
  bimix_tbl %>% 
  filter(method %in% method_order) %>% 
  filter(is_mixed) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(minor_percent_pred)) %>% 
  mutate(method = factor(method, method_order)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(
    x=minor_percent, 
    y=minor_percent_pred, 
    group = minor_percent
  )) +
  geom_abline(col = 'red') +
  geom_boxplot(
    fill = NA,
    outlier.alpha = 0.5,
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    trans = 'log2',
    breaks = breaks, 
    minor_breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = 'log2',
    breaks = breaks,
    minor_breaks = NULL) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  facet_wrap(~method, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = 'Minor Strain Percentage',
       y = 'Predicted Percentage')

panel_B
```

```{r panel_C}
panel_C <-
  is_trio_accuracy %>% 
  filter(method %in% method_order) %>% 
  mutate(method = factor(method, method_order)) %>% 
  arrange(method) %>% 
  mutate(label = str_c(method, '\naccuracy=', format(round(accuracy, 2)))) %>% 
  mutate(label = as_factor(label)) %>% 
  group_by(label, mix_n, mix_n_pred) %>% 
  count() %>% 
  group_by(label, mix_n) %>% 
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  # mutate(mix_n_pred = ordered(mix_n_pred, 3:1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = mix_n,
    y = percent,
    fill = mix_n_pred)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~label, nrow = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = 'No. Strains\nPredicted')) +
  labs(x = 'No. Strains', y = 'Percent')
panel_C
```

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
nomar <- theme(
  plot.margin = margin(t=0,b=0,r=0,l=0),
  plot.title = element_text(margin = margin(t=0,b=0,r=0,l=0)))

cowplot::plot_grid(
  panel_A + ggtitle('A.') + nomar,
  panel_B + ggtitle('B.') + nomar,
  panel_C + ggtitle('C.') + nomar,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(8,5,4),
  align = 'v',
  axis = 'lr'
)
```

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=8}
# library(patchwork)
# nomar <- theme(
#   plot.margin = margin(t=0,b=0,r=0,l=0),
#   plot.title = element_text(margin = margin(t=0,b=0,r=0,l=0)))
# 
# (panel_A + ggtitle('A.') + nomar) + 
#   plot_spacer() +
#   (panel_B + ggtitle('B.') + nomar) +
#   plot_spacer() +
#   (panel_C + ggtitle('C.') + nomar) +
#   plot_layout(
#     ncol = 1, 
#     heights = c(9,-0.2,3,-0.2,2.2),
#   )

```
